name: ai-engineering-fluency
description: Track your AI Engineering Fluency — daily and monthly token usage, cost estimates, and AI fluency insights in VS Code.

copilotTokenTracker.display.compactNumbe.description: Show token counts in compact format using K/M suffixes (e.g. 1.5K, 1.2M). When disabled, full numbers are shown (e.g. 1,500, 1,200,000).
copilotTokenTracker.display.compactNumbe.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.display.compactNumbers. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.enabled.description: Enable backend sync to an Azure-backed store (default: Azure Storage Tables).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.enabled.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.enabled. Will be removed in a future release.

enumDescriptions: Azure Storage Tables (requires Azure subscription + RBAC setup)
Self-hosted sharing server (configure endpoint URL; authenticates via your existing GitHub session)
copilotTokenTracker.backend.backend.description: Backend sync backend. Supports Azure Storage Tables and self-hosted sharing server.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.backend.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.backend. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.authMode.description: Authentication mode for backend sync data-plane access. Default is Entra ID RBAC (DefaultAzureCredential). Shared Key uses VS Code SecretStorage and does not sync across devices.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.authMode.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.authMode. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.datasetId.description: Logical dataset identifier to avoid accidental mixing when sharing a backend.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.datasetId.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.datasetId. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.sharingProfi.description: Sharing Profile (single source of truth): off (no cloud sync), soloFull (personal full fidelity), teamAnonymized (no per-user key), teamPseudonymous (stable per-user key), teamIdentified (explicit identity).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.sharingProfi.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.sharingProfile. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.userId.description: Optional user identifier to enable team-wide reporting with per-user filtering. Empty disables the user dimension.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.userId.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.userId. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.shareWithTea.description: Explicit consent flag. When false, no per-user identifier is written to the backend store.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.shareWithTea.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.shareWithTeam. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.shareWorkspa.description: When team sharing is enabled, also write workspace and machine display names to the backend store (may contain sensitive information).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.shareWorkspa.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.shareWorkspaceMachineNames. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.shareConsent.description: ISO timestamp when team sharing was enabled (consent recorded).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.shareConsent.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.shareConsentAt. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.userIdentity.description: How the per-user dimension is derived when team sharing is enabled. pseudonymous hashes Entra claims scoped to datasetId; teamAlias uses backend.userId (validated); entraObjectId stores a GUID (advanced).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.userIdentity.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.userIdentityMode. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.userIdMode.description: How the user identifier is intended to be used. 'alias' is recommended; 'custom' may contain personal data (PII).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.userIdMode.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.userIdMode. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.subscription.description: Azure subscription ID used for provisioning (wizard-managed).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.subscription.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.subscriptionId. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.resourceGrou.description: Azure resource group name for the Storage account (wizard-managed).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.resourceGrou.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.resourceGroup. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.storageAccou.description: Azure Storage account name for backend sync (wizard-managed).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.storageAccou.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.storageAccount. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.aggTable.description: Azure Table name for daily rollups.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.aggTable.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.aggTable. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.eventsTable.description: Azure Table name for optional raw events (not required for MVP reporting).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.eventsTable.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.eventsTable. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.lookbackDays.description: Default backfill/lookback window (days) for syncing local usage to the backend store.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.lookbackDays.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.lookbackDays. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.includeMachi.description: Include machine dimension in backend rollups. Recommended for correct cross-device convergence.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.includeMachi.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.includeMachineBreakdown. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.blobUploadEn.description: Enable uploading session log files to Azure Blob Storage. Files are uploaded with configurable frequency and can be used by GitHub Copilot Coding Agent.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.blobUploadEn.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.blobUploadEnabled. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.blobContaine.description: Name of the Azure Blob Storage container for session log files.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.blobContaine.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.blobContainerName. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.blobUploadFr.description: How often to upload session log files to blob storage (in hours). Default is once per day (24 hours).
copilotTokenTracker.backend.blobUploadFr.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.blobUploadFrequencyHours. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.backend.blobCompress.description: Compress session log files with gzip before uploading to blob storage to reduce storage costs and bandwidth.
copilotTokenTracker.backend.blobCompress.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.backend.blobCompressFiles. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.sampleDataDirectory.description: Screenshot/demo mode: when set to a folder path, overrides all session file scanning and returns only .json/.jsonl files from this directory. Leave empty for normal operation.
copilotTokenTracker.sampleDataDirectory.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.sampleDataDirectory. Will be removed in a future release.

copilotTokenTracker.suppressedUnknownToo.description: List of tool names to suppress from the 'Unknown Tools Found' section in the Usage Analysis dashboard. Useful for tools you are testing that don't yet have friendly display names.
copilotTokenTracker.suppressedUnknownToo.deprecationMessage: Renamed to aiEngineeringFluency.suppressedUnknownTools. Will be removed in a future release.

aiEngineeringFluency.display.compactNumb.description: Show token counts in compact format using K/M suffixes (e.g. 1.5K, 1.2M). When disabled, full numbers are shown (e.g. 1,500, 1,200,000).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.enabled.description: Enable backend sync to an Azure-backed store (default: Azure Storage Tables).

enumDescriptions: Azure Storage Tables (requires Azure subscription + RBAC setup)
Self-hosted sharing server (configure endpoint URL; authenticates via your existing GitHub session)
aiEngineeringFluency.backend.backend.description: Backend sync backend. Supports Azure Storage Tables and self-hosted sharing server.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.authMode.description: Authentication mode for backend sync data-plane access. Default is Entra ID RBAC (DefaultAzureCredential). Shared Key uses VS Code SecretStorage and does not sync across devices.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.datasetId.description: Logical dataset identifier to avoid accidental mixing when sharing a backend.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.sharingProf.description: Sharing Profile (single source of truth): off (no cloud sync), soloFull (personal full fidelity), teamAnonymized (no per-user key), teamPseudonymous (stable per-user key), teamIdentified (explicit identity).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.userId.description: Optional user identifier to enable team-wide reporting with per-user filtering. Empty disables the user dimension.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.shareWithTe.description: Explicit consent flag. When false, no per-user identifier is written to the backend store.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.shareWorksp.description: When team sharing is enabled, also write workspace and machine display names to the backend store (may contain sensitive information).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.shareConsen.description: ISO timestamp when team sharing was enabled (consent recorded).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.userIdentit.description: How the per-user dimension is derived when team sharing is enabled. pseudonymous hashes Entra claims scoped to datasetId; teamAlias uses backend.userId (validated); entraObjectId stores a GUID (advanced).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.userIdMode.description: How the user identifier is intended to be used. 'alias' is recommended; 'custom' may contain personal data (PII).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.subscriptio.description: Azure subscription ID used for provisioning (wizard-managed).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.resourceGro.description: Azure resource group name for the Storage account (wizard-managed).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.storageAcco.description: Azure Storage account name for backend sync (wizard-managed).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.aggTable.description: Azure Table name for daily rollups.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.eventsTable.description: Azure Table name for optional raw events (not required for MVP reporting).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.lookbackDay.description: Default backfill/lookback window (days) for syncing local usage to the backend store.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.includeMach.description: Include machine dimension in backend rollups. Recommended for correct cross-device convergence.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.blobUploadE.description: Enable uploading session log files to Azure Blob Storage. Files are uploaded with configurable frequency and can be used by GitHub Copilot Coding Agent.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.blobContain.description: Name of the Azure Blob Storage container for session log files.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.blobUploadF.description: How often to upload session log files to blob storage (in hours). Default is once per day (24 hours).

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.blobCompres.description: Compress session log files with gzip before uploading to blob storage to reduce storage costs and bandwidth.

aiEngineeringFluency.backend.sharingServ.description: Enable syncing to the self-hosted Team Server backend. Can run simultaneously with Azure Storage (backend.enabled). Requires backend.sharingServer.endpointUrl to be configured.
Base URL of the self-hosted sharing server (e.g. https://copilot-sharing.example.com). Authentication is handled automatically via your existing GitHub session — no API key needed.

aiEngineeringFluency.sampleDataDirectory.description: Screenshot/demo mode: when set to a folder path, overrides all session file scanning and returns only .json/.jsonl files from this directory. Leave empty for normal operation.

aiEngineeringFluency.suppressedUnknownTo.description: List of tool names to suppress from the 'Unknown Tools Found' section in the Usage Analysis dashboard. Useful for tools you are testing that don't yet have friendly display names.

scripts.pretest: tsc --noEmit && eslint src && node esbuild.js && node ../scripts/prepare-test-output.js && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json
scripts.test:mutation: npm run compile-tests && npx stryker run
scripts.cli:build: cd cli && npm install && npm run build
scripts.cli:build:production: cd cli && npm install && npm run build:production
